name: Regal Car Sales & Credit
description_short: Buy Here Pay Here used car dealer with in-house financing across 14 Oklahoma and Missouri locations. Offers used vehicle sales with flexible payment plans and bad credit financing.
description_long:
Regal Car Sales and Credit is an established used car dealership and financing operation that has been in business for over 35 years. The company operates 14 locations across Oklahoma and Missouri, serving customers in the South and Midwest regions. Their primary business model is "Buy Here Pay Here" financing, where they sell used vehicles directly to consumers and provide in-house financing rather than referring customers to third-party lenders.

The company offers a wide inventory of used vehicles including cars, trucks, and SUVs across all major makes and models. Their financing program is designed for customers with bad credit or limited financing options through traditional lenders. Down payments start at $485 for well-qualified buyers, and they provide multiple payment methods including AutoPay, in-store checks, and money grams. All used vehicles come with a 12-month/12,000-mile Limited Warranty.

Regal distinguishes itself through its 35-year track record, multi-state presence, and flexible payment infrastructure. Their tagline—"We're here to finance your future, not your past"—emphasizes their focus on serving customers rejected by traditional auto financing. The company also offers trade-in options and online inventory browsing before in-store visits.

However, this is fundamentally a used car dealer, not a traditional personal lender. Customers must purchase a vehicle to access financing; loans are vehicle-dependent. As a Buy Here Pay Here operation, profit relies on vehicle markups and payment processing fees. No information is provided about APR, loan terms, or total cost of ownership, which are critical for comparing this to other financing options.
address: 3515 N May Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73112

company_info.headquarters: 3515 N May Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73112

pros: 35-year operational history demonstrates business longevity and experience
14 convenient locations across Oklahoma and Missouri reduce travel friction
Low entry down payments ($485 minimum) for well-qualified buyers
Multiple flexible payment methods (AutoPay, checks, money grams) for convenience
12-month/12,000-mile warranty included on all used vehicle purchases
Bad credit friendly—explicitly markets to customers traditional lenders reject
Online inventory and pre-approval process streamlines shopping experience
cons: No disclosed APR or loan terms on website—critical pricing information missing
Financing tied to vehicle purchase; cannot borrow without buying a car
Inventory consists entirely of used vehicles; no information on vehicle quality standards
Buy Here Pay Here model typically carries higher effective interest rates than traditional auto loans
No details on loan term lengths, total cost, or payment schedules available
best_for: Customers with poor or no credit history who need transportation
Buyers unable to qualify for traditional auto loans from banks or credit unions
Those seeking immediate vehicle access with low upfront capital requirements
Individuals in Oklahoma or Missouri with flexible payment method preferences
diagnosis: Regal Car Sales and Credit is best for unbanked or credit-challenged consumers who need immediate vehicle access and can provide a down payment of $485+. The main caveat is that this is a vehicle purchase with embedded financing, not a standalone loan product—you must buy a used car to access credit, and no APR or total cost information is disclosed, making true cost comparison impossible.
services: Used car sales (cars, trucks, SUVs across all makes and models)
Buy Here Pay Here in-house financing
